p.em: Implementation-grade structural layout and state transition logic

ul.li: Memory Alignment: _padding ensures groupsMu starts on an 8-byte boundary for optimal cache line performance.
Atomics: All reads of latestOffset and throttling MUST use sync/atomic to prevent race conditions during CalculateLag.
Hysteresis: The 5,000 message gap between High and Low thresholds prevents oscillation (thrashing) of the throttle state.
Cache Line Dash: Structural fields 00-56 fit within a standard 64B line; padding at 56 completes the 80B allocation.

g.text: 3. Iterate map: maxLag = MAX(maxLag, latest - committed)
